title: Evidence summary for rule_fxd_ndf_fixing_time
summary: fixingTime hourMinuteTime and businessCenter both come from the shared cutoff lookup.
warnings: OCR was performed from photographed monitor images; some long target XPaths were truncated and reconstructed by convention.
Source and target element casing was normalized to visible FpML/SCBML conventions.
Workbook spelling includes `PRIMARY_SOUCE_*`; this draft preserves visible column spelling in lookup return fields.
The photographed pack is accepted for local demo signoff, but source-photo reconstruction should be rechecked before production signoff.
